title: dryopteris milnei
intro: Dryopteris milnei, also known as the New Zealand shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris milnei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
